home.title: Everything important for Neumünster on one platform
home.description: MyNMS combines lost-and-found reports, local news and featured places from the city in a clear mobile-first interface.
home.animalsDescription: Discover, report and match missing or found animals quickly.
home.objectsDescription: Make lost or found objects visible and share them directly.
home.issuesDescription: Jump straight to the official ideas and complaints portal of the city of Neumünster.
home.newsDescription: The newest local stories from NDR, KN, SHZ, Police, Fire Department and the City in one place.
home.newsEmpty: There are no cached news items yet.
home.featuredDescription: Local clubs, initiatives and creatives at a glance.

news.title: News from Neumünster
news.description: Local RSS feeds bundled, sorted by date and cached hourly.
news.empty: No news items found for this source.

entries.descriptionAnimals: Missing and found animals from Neumünster and nearby.
entries.descriptionObjects: Lost and found objects from Neumünster.

newEntry.title: Create a new lost or found report
newEntry.description: Submit a local entry for animals or objects directly without an account.
newEntry.photoHint: A single picture helps others recognize it.
newEntry.error: The entry could not be saved.
newEntry.errorNoLocation: Please select a location on the map.
newEntry.descriptionPlaceholder: What happened, when was it seen and how can it be identified?
newEntry.contactPlaceholder: Phone, email or note on how to get in touch

entryDetail.confirmDescription: The entry will stay visible but be labeled as resolved.
entryDetail.noLocation: No location has been stored for this entry yet.

entryEdit.noToken: No token found. You cannot edit this entry without the correct token.
entryEdit.loadError: The entry could not be loaded.
entryEdit.forbiddenError: Invalid token – you do not have access to this entry.

editLink.title: Entry saved
editLink.description: Your personal edit link has been created.
editLink.warning: Save this link – it is the only way to edit or delete your entry later.

directory.title: Featured in Neumünster
directory.description: Local businesses, clubs, initiatives and creatives with their own profile card.
directory.empty: No approved entries are available for this category yet.
directory.suggestDescription: New profiles are stored as pending first and can be approved later.
directory.name: Name
directory.success: The suggestion was stored and is waiting for approval.
directory.error: The suggestion could not be saved.
directory.logoHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP – max. 5 MB

footer.description: MyNMS is the local platform for reports, news and visible neighborhood life in Neumünster.
